text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep our space safe and welcoming!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 We're glad to have you here. Feel free to explore and don't hesitate to ask questions!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You're now a mentor. Your experience and guidance will be invaluable to our newer members!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You're now an event helper. Looking forward to seeing the awesome events you'll help organize!
